meaning: n 飞盘(塑料投掷玩具)
examples: I won cheers while playing frisbee games with a group of graduates.
I've played ultimate frisbee here on the Killian Court, so that was a lot of fun.
High winds can get under the frisbee and change its direction, making it difficult for team members to pass.
Spiridigliozzi is tired of the soup and Jell-O, and Perry looks forward to playing Frisbee again.
Eye-hand coordination is best in late afternoon, making that a good time for racquetball or Frisbee.
